rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>Look...<unk[5:0]> See how this <Color=red>stone statue<Color=white> has
fallen into the wall?

These statues are typically set in rows
with one sight line leading to the next
until they finally stop at an <Color=red>old mine<Color=white>.
But this is different. This chain of statues
ends here.<unk[5:0]> I've looked all over, but there's
no sign of an old mine.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Normally, <Color=red>stone statues <Color=white>like these are
arranged in a row leading to an <Color=red>old mine<Color=white>.

But this row doesn't lead anywhere.<unk[5:0]>
I've looked all over, but there's no sign
of an old mine.
<unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>If there's no way to get <Color=red>inside the wall<Color=white>,
maybe it's just a misplaced set of statues.
Still, it's weird...
